creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
Upgrade p5-WWW-Search from 1.021 to 2.09.
Changes from previous version:
	1) Remove BROKEN. I fixed the PREFIX problem. Committer
	   should be careful to ensure that a patches/ directory
	   exists when applying this patch against the port.
	2) Move MAN3 to a separate file to reduce diff sizes.
	   Indirectly suggested by: green.
	3) Sort PLIST.

Although I didn't test the upgrade on my -CURRENT system, this
should fix it for 4.0-RELEASE.

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the patch below to fix the current port.
